generation.revised_prompt:
Create one realistic outfit preview image for a Korean mobile-first fashion community post. Candid elevator mirror selfie on a weekday morning before a meeting in a modern Seoul office building. Vertical 4:5 crop, half-to-full body framing, natural relaxed posture; subject holds a smartphone at chest height with one hand, tote strap on one shoulder, neutral expression. Ordinary cool fluorescent elevator lighting, slight stainless-steel reflections, realistic smartphone sharpness with light grain—believable as an everyday social upload.

Outfit inspired by the provided references only for silhouette and color family (do not replicate exact garments, logos, or unique design details):
- Outer layer: camel zip-front belted wool jacket with soft structure, lightly cinched at the waist.
- Under layer: off-white ribbed turtleneck knit.
- Bottoms: navy wide-leg trousers tailored to create a gentle single break that just kisses the vamp of the shoes—no heavy stacking—to avoid a shortened look.
- Footwear: classic black leather loafers with thin black socks matching the loafers.
- Accessories: minimal silver stud earrings; simple black leather tote or slim crossbody.

Tone and styling: understated weekday office/commute outfit, believable and unpolished. Keep posture and framing natural, not editorial. Ensure the hem/loafer area is clearly visible to judge the trouser break. No text overlays, no collage layout, no luxury-campaign gloss, and do not imply exact brand-official proof or an exact garment transfer.

generation.revised_prompt:
Create a single realistic mobile-first outfit preview photo for a Korean social-fashion community post. Do not make it look like an editorial or brand campaign. No text overlay, no collage, no logos.

Scene and mood:
- Weekday morning outside a small office building/cafe, Seoul-style sidewalk backdrop with neutral signage blurred. Ordinary, soft natural daylight (slightly overcast). Realistic smartphone vertical frame (4:5), subtle grain, no heavy retouching.
- Half-to-full body framing, natural posture as if pausing on the way to an appointment.

Model and pose:
- A young adult woman with a clean, everyday look; hair in a low pony. Minimal makeup. Relaxed expression, standing casually with one hand resting on a small bag and the other adjusting an outer layer. No exaggerated pose.

Outfit styling (use references only for silhouette/color family, not exact product transfer):
- Main piece: a sky-blue tweed short-sleeve belted mini dress, above the knee, simple crew neck, subtle texture. Feels polished but approachable.
- Layer to reduce formality: a lightweight, dark chocolate collarless blouse-style jacket worn open (inspired by a dark long-sleeve blouse), soft drape, slightly cropped length.
- Shoes: beige low block-heel slingback flats for a commute-friendly, slightly dressed-up office mood.
- Bag: a small structured cream mini top-handle bag (no branding), carried casually.
- Accessories: tiny gold stud earrings, delicate watch. Nothing flashy.

Style notes for realism:
- Natural wrinkles and movement in fabrics; believable proportions.
- Ordinary lighting and shadows; avoid studio polish or dramatic color grading.
- Keep the overall read slightly dressed-up yet not too formal for a normal work morning.
- Ensure the image looks like a real everyday social-fashion upload rather than official product photography or an exact virtual try-on.

generation.revised_prompt:
Create one realistic smartphone mirror selfie for a Korean mobile-first fashion community post. This is a casual styling preview, not an exact virtual try-on or official product photo. Scene: weekday morning after arriving at the office—full-length mirror near the entry hallway with gray carpet, glass partition, lockers, and a potted plant. Overhead fluorescent lighting, ordinary and slightly cool. Natural, believable atmosphere with faint mirror smudges; no studio polish, no filters, no beauty retouching.

Framing: full body or half body in vertical 4:5 ratio. Subject stands relaxed with one leg slightly forward, holding the phone up to cover most of the face (no recognizable identity). No exaggerated pose.

Outfit styling (use the attached reference pants image only for guidance on silhouette, category, and color family):
- Bottoms: high-waisted, wide-leg, pleated trousers in taupe/light khaki similar to the reference image’s shape and color, draping over black square-toe loafers.
- Top: fitted ivory knit tee tucked in to define the waist.
- Outer: oversized, soft-shoulder blazer in charcoal/dark gray, worn open to create vertical lines. Sleeves softly pushed up to mid-forearm.
- Accessories: thin black leather belt, simple silver ring and watch, black leather shoulder tote; optional blank office ID card on a lanyard (no text or logos).

Styling goal: the upper half is oversized without making the body look heavier—keep the blazer unbuttoned, show a defined waist with tuck and belt, slight V/open neckline. Overall tone should feel like a real weekday office or commute outfit photo from an everyday user, not an editorial campaign. Avoid any text overlays, collage layouts, brand marks, or luxury-campaign polish. Keep everything believable and everyday.

generation.revised_prompt:
Create one realistic, single-frame smartphone mirror photo suitable for a Korean mobile-first social-fashion community post. This is a casual styling preview, not an exact virtual try-on and not official product imagery. 

Scene and vibe:
- Weekday office dressing-room or building corridor mirror, just before/after work or before purchase. Narrow space, white or light-grey walls, metal hooks and a small bench in the background. Ordinary overhead fluorescent lighting with natural shadows; slight phone-camera grain; no studio polish.
- Vertical composition; half-body to three-quarter framing. Natural, believable posture.

Subject and outfit (use the attached black blazer only as guidance for color family and general silhouette; do not copy brand tags or exact design details):
- Adult woman taking a mirror selfie with a neutral-colored phone; face partially obscured by phone. One hand in pants pocket, the other holding the phone. Sleeves of the blazer lightly pushed up.
- Black single-breasted blazer, matte fabric, soft shoulder, two buttons, notch lapels; slightly relaxed fit. No visible logos or labels; generic and unbranded; approximate the reference only.
- Under the blazer: plain white crewneck tee.
- Bottoms: charcoal straight-leg trousers with a gentle drape.
- Footwear: clean white low-top sneakers.
- Accessories: simple canvas tote on forearm, minimal silver studs, slim watch. No luxury signals.

Styling intention:
- Make the blazer feel everyday and approachable for office/commute: unbuttoned, relaxed fit, sleeves eased, paired with tee, trousers, and sneakers.

Image rules:
- Keep it believable like a real user’s fitting-room upload. No text overlays, no collage frames, no watermarks, no dramatic color grading, no brand signage. Do not imply exact brand-official proof or an exact garment transfer.
- Ensure the blazer color is black and the silhouette is similar but not identical to the reference piece.
